input_text:
Migration 0043 (adding a not-null status column to orders) was broken. It tried to add the column and set a default value in one transaction, but existing rows were still null after the migration because the UPDATE statement was missing a WHERE clause.

Fixed the migration: added a correct WHERE clause (WHERE status IS NULL). Wrote a separate data repair migration to fix the rows affected by the broken run in staging.
reviewer_notes: Migration bug (missing WHERE clause) fixed with a data-repair migration. Resolved.
